name: Chitty-Chitty Bang-Bang Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Stir over low heat until the mixture reaches soft ball stage when dropped in cold water.
3. Beat by hand until the mixture loses its gloss.
4. Add chopped nuts if desired.
5. Pour into a greased 8 x 8-inch pan.
6. Cool and cut into squares.
This recipe was inspired by "Chitty-Chitty Bang-Bang" storybook read to son, Curtis Burton, in grade school and has been a family favorite since 1970.
